args.command: bash -c 'cd ${fileDirname} && (echo "/**"; echo " *    author:  mackerel38"; echo -n " *    created: "; TZ=Asia/Tokyo date "+%d.%m.%Y %H:%M:%S"; echo "**/"; oj-bundle -I /workspaces/competitive/library ${file}) > ${fileDirname}/bundled.cpp && cd /workspaces/competitive'
